Composition.Programmer 1: Fix and implement the 'app.py' file focusing on the Dashboard page rendering function 'render_dashboard_page'. Ensure the Dashboard page template has the correct <title> tag "Museum Dashboard", includes a div with id="dashboard-page", a div with id="exhibition-summary", and buttons with the specified IDs including 'artifact-catalog-button'. Verify that these buttons have proper navigation attributes (href or onclick) to enable navigation to other pages. This task involves correcting the current issue where the Dashboard page title is incorrect ("News Portal") and required elements are missing, likely due to rendering the wrong template or an incomplete template. The programmer should also coordinate with other programmers responsible for other pages to ensure navigation targets are correctly linked.

Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
